title: TASK-40.1 HubRSC decomposition
instructions: Treat TASK-40.1 as a structural-prep refactor only.
Honor TASK-40 parent architecture, but keep TASK-40.2 recipient-registration/funding behavior and TASK-40.3 regression revalidation out of scope.
Keep scope reactive-only and preserve HubRSC public runtime behavior except for review-required safety fixes discovered during decomposition.
Allow the constructor to reject `maxDispatchItems == 0` because the decomposed dispatch path depends on a positive scan window and review required that guard.

Allow preserving zero-batch continuation budget across `MoreLiquidityAvailable` callback re-entry so blocked intermediate windows do not strand later dispatchable work; keep that exception limited to the review-driven continuation fix.
